headline: Fortinet Earnings Beat Sparks Fresh Look At Valuation And SASE Growth
summary: Fortinet reported stronger than expected fourth quarter results, with revenue and earnings per share coming in ahead of earlier expectations. The company highlighted robust demand across its cybersecurity services and positive billings growth guidance. Fortinet reiterated its focus on Secure Access Service Edge, underlining its position in this segment of the cybersecurity market. For investors watching NasdaqGS:FTNT, the latest report adds fresh detail to the story around Fortinet at a...
